title: George police constable shot in his home
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A 25-year-old constable stationed at the George police station was shot and wounded in his home in Meade Street during the early hours of Sunday morning, 31 August.


> Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies said officers responded to the scene at about 03:40 after receiving reports of a shooting.


The off-duty constable had sustained several gunshot wounds to his body and was rushed to the hospital, where he remains under medical care.

The suspect fled in a Volkswagen Polo, which was later found abandoned in Dana Bay. No arrests have been made, and the suspect is still at large.

George detectives have opened a case of attempted murder for investigation.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
